query: Design a production-ready EKS architecture for our fintech platform. We need multi-AZ, strict PCI compliance, and the design doc should include Mermaid diagrams and ADRs.
Generate an architecture design document for our new EKS cluster. We're running 20 microservices with GPU workloads and need to decide on networking model, compute strategy, and security posture.
Create ADRs for our EKS deployment decisions: why we chose Karpenter over MNG, why we picked VPC CNI in prefix delegation mode, and why we're using Gateway API instead of ALB Ingress.
Review and score our current EKS architecture against Well-Architected best practices. Here's our design: single cluster, 3 AZs, Karpenter with Spot, IRSA for all workloads, Istio service mesh.

We need to choose between EKS Standard with Karpenter, EKS Auto Mode, and EKS on Outposts for our manufacturing edge use case. Generate an architecture comparison document with pros/cons and a recommendation.
Create a security architecture document for our EKS cluster covering network policies, pod security standards, encryption at rest/transit, IRSA vs Pod Identity, and image signing.
Generate a Mermaid architecture diagram showing our EKS cluster topology: VPC layout, subnet tiers, load balancer placement, node groups, and pod networking flow.
Validate our EKS design for a healthcare SaaS platform. Requirements: HIPAA compliance, multi-region DR, 99.99% availability. Produce a validation report with gap analysis and risk scores.

We're planning an EKS architecture for our ML training platform. Design the compute strategy covering GPU node pools, Karpenter provisioners, Spot interruption handling, and storage (EBS vs FSx). Output should be a design doc that feeds into Terraform generation.
Create an architecture decision record for choosing between IPv4 prefix delegation and IPv6 for our EKS cluster networking, considering our 500-pod-per-node density requirement.
Should I use Karpenter or managed node groups for my EKS cluster? We have bursty batch jobs and want to minimize cost.
Generate the Terraform modules and Helm values for our EKS cluster based on the architecture design we finalized last week.
Review my Terraform PR for the EKS module. Check naming conventions, variable validation, and whether I'm following conventional commits.
What version of Kubernetes is my EKS cluster running? List all installed add-ons and their versions.
What are best practices for configuring Karpenter consolidation policies to reduce Spot interruption impact?
Can you inventory the node groups, namespaces, and IRSA roles in my production EKS cluster before I start the upgrade?
Write the ArgoCD ApplicationSet and Kustomize overlays to deploy our platform add-ons to the new EKS cluster.
Is it better to run CoreDNS on Fargate or on dedicated managed nodes? Just a quick recommendation, no doc needed.
